title: The things really are fascinating…
body: I love the range of interesting topics this podcast covers and the amusing way Kyle and Adam cover them.  Their overview of the Chinchilla kidnapping is my favourite so far - truth is stranger than fiction!
author: Dep Dale

title: New Listener from Africa!
body: Absolutely love how you guys tell stories catch myself talking back as if i am the third podcast member! keep going🩷
author: ranad4

title: Carling
body: Great show really love the way you tell these story’s
author: Carlingryderpeyton

title: My new guilty pleasure
body: Found these guys recently and have been binge listening the back catalogue daily! Interesting topics and great voices to listen to. Thanks guys, love the banter and friendly jibing.
author: Melissa

title: Love from an Aussie
body: Love Kyle and Adam! Really great and concise storytelling! Topics are always really interesting. Well done, mates!
author: Bec Ballard

title: Educational, yet helarious
body:
I love these two silly goofballs, they are able to present the topics so well. They cover a range of things from all over the world. Their podcast is really easy to listen to, and perfect for any time. Even if you're not interested in a topic, they will still make the episode entertaining and suspenseful.

Oh, and they do fulfill their promise, I can now confidently stand my ground in any social gathering. Even if it's a story you already know, you will still come away learning something new.
author: Al

title: Excellent
body: I can even get past the occasional mispronunciation because they do such a nice job on everything else! Love the banter.
author: Jennifer Hogan

title: Can’t resist the subscription.
body: I’m not thrilled that they started charging a subscription fee for future episodes, but I can’t resist. I love listening to these two while at the gym late nights. This podcast has quickly become one of my favorites.
author: JoPy31

title: Love!
body: This is a fun podcast covering a nice array of pop culture and history moments.
author: deirdrerosesouthwest

title: Cheerful Chappies!
body: Really enjoy listening to this podcast. Varied content. Adam and Kyle humour and enthusiasm is infectious! 😂
author: Trailie Sue

title: Any of the podcasts
body: My husband never listens to podcasts, unless they are about financial stuff (which is good, because I have tried but still don't get the investing/stocks stuff). He LOVES listening to your podcast. Probably a good thing, because I always drive, so I get to pick what we listen to in the car. He enjoys the podcasts, because he is entertained while being educated...and honestly, our youngest son is absolutely Kyle (Adam, we feel your pain :), so he likes that aspect, too . If it matters, we live in the flyover state of Kansas, just below Nebraska and Iowa and share a road with Missiouri, which is actually called State Line Road. West side is Kansas, east side is Missouri.
author: Sheryl

title: Five Stars!
body: Such a clever, witty and genuinely fun podcast.  Highly recommend!
author: HaniaCMB

title: Great stuff!
body: Just started listening to these guys, and really enjoying it. Interesting topics, fun and funny hosts . Thanks, guys
author: Stabby-birb-boi

title: Adam and Kyle!!
body: I found your podcast while looking for true crime stories. And I just fell in love with both of you and your way of telling the stories!! Y’all always make my day. Thank you and keep it going!
author: Bluciferrrr

title: Great pod
body: Love this pod - well researched & funny, gives way more context to stories than even Netflix/hulu docs that can feel more one sided. Keep it up guys!
author: Khomsf

title: Well researched and entertaining
body: I can add this pod to my list of favourites. The hosts are engaging and discuss interesting well-researched topics. Glad I’ve subscribed 🙌🏾
author: kkpod87

title: Love this pod
body: This podcast is like sitting down with a couple of good friends. Stories are well-researched and the delivery style is casual but not full of the annoying sound issues and pointless diversions that are common in these types of podcasts. Keep it up!!!!
author: Jb5423

title: One of my fav’s - easily!!
body:
Just 🩷🩷🩷🩷🩷Kyle & Adam!
Perfect blend of humor, banter - though not too much, just right! Very well researched episodes & Kyle is a wonderfully talented narrator/ storyteller/ documentarian…..what to call him….🤔. Wait!  PODCASTER!!!
Anyway, they both have beautiful voices & I find I am quickly immersed in the episode at hand. Some podcasts, even the very good ones, can be a little less seductive at first. These 2 gentlemen smoothly seduce one in before you know it. 😀😆 my guess is they’ll have a good laugh at that one!
author: AnnaSewell

title: Fascinating Subjects and Superb Storytelling
body: Discovered this whilst on holiday in August, and eagerly delved into the back catalogue; love the wide variety of subjects covered and the casual conversational storytelling style. Highly recommended.
author: Isla Maclean

title: Must listen!
body: Deep dive into specific historical events with context and humor. Love these guys.
author: ty geren

title: Favorite Podcast
body: Love you guys 🤗
author: Sarah_93x

title: Fantastic listen!
body: I'm not even sure how I came across this show but I am absolutely hooked! Kyle and Adam are absolute gems and the stories are so incredibly well done. I love the mix of true crime, wild stories and everything they talk about. At this point I feel like I've listened to most of the stories, but not with this podcast. I feel like I am always learning something new! Highest of recommendations!
author: Nick Twining

title: Hilarious
body: Dying laughing at them reading Charles and Camilla’s tampongate transcript!! Hilarious.
author: Audreyprime

title: I'm in love...
body:
I LOVE this show - it gives me life. You are fantastic storytellers, and I swear you are the only two people who make me laugh out loud these days. It's like hanging out with fun friends, and I wish I could buy you both a cocktail.
Keep up the amazing work! Thank you for making me so happy!
Dawn
(I'd love to hear your take on the Netflix documentary - "Unknown Number: The High School Catfish." Pure insanity.)
author: Dawn Fenton - Monterey, California

title: Brilliant Podcast.
body: The topics and the people spoken about are really interesting. A great podcast with great hosts who are funny too. I would highly recommend a listen.
author: Stephen Berry

title: Stumbled onto this podcast and now I love it!
body:
Kyle's laugh is infectious and Adam sounds exactly like Benedict Cumberbatch.

10/10 would binge again
author: Katherine

title: Fav podcast
body: Love this podcast and look forward to the new eps each week. The topics they cover are so interesting
author: Lizap99

title: Amazing
body:
I listen to this podcast every single night!
EDIT- as much as I love you guys are having a break… I really need you both to come back now!!
author: Pmelodyy

title: José
body: Did it for the money…you’ve got to be kidding? They used their shotgun as an eraser. 16 times. I worked for Jose was a total jerk. If you don’t believe it, just ask the boys from Menudo that Jose was fondle of.
author: J Clam

title: Funny and informative
body: Love the detail of info and the hosts are very entertaining!
author: Audreyprime

title: Glad I Found This!!
body: I got obsessed after watching the Netflix doc on the Titan submersible and went searching for more info! I came across the "Oceangate Titan Disaster" episode, and I've been hooked ever since. They do an incredible amount of research for each show and are quite entertaining. I love that they don't take themselves too seriously. The topics they cover are really intriguing and the show holds my interest. I've been downloading back episodes to "catch up!" It's a great listen for my afternoon walk!!
author: Ann P

title: Highly recommend!
body: Really glad I stumbled across this podcast :)
author: Sally_H_J

title: I liked the logo and now love the show
body: I was desperate for a new podcast to listen to throughout my day, I saw the logo and the name and thought it was witty and decided to zoom backward to the first episode. I’m not yet caught (somewhere in 2024 I think) up but I have enjoyed every episode so far. The artwork for each episode is fantastic and the topics are wonderful and I know I will be sad when I get caught up and have to wait for new episodes 😂. These two are totally worth a listen!
author: Allie I.

title: Great Find!
body: I was looking for information on a specific topic in the search feature in Apple podcast brought me to this show. I love the way they break down what’s going on in the world and the commentary is fantastic. Keep up the good work!
author: Kluvspooh

title: Fun, Entertaining and Informative
body: Absolutely love Kyle and Adam’s show! Super fun and entertaining but I also learn a lot. Awesome job putting the pod together guys! You pick great topics to cover.
author: BelH4321

title: Best Podcast Ever
body: I started listening to this show literally a week ago and I became obsessed. It started with the Ocean Gate episode and I was so fascinated and amazed by all the humor yet details in the cases. In a week I’ve listened to 40+ episodes and I’m still going! I cannot wait for more episodes to drop. I can’t get enough!
author: Aubrey Rash

title: Great Show
body: You guys are doing a bang up job. Love the show.
author: Matt Cundill

title: Awesome
body:
Absolut blast to listen to. Always interesting regardless of topics. One of the best for me was Chernobyl that was so well presented.
Love the bickering and how good every episode is written.
author: Tony from Sweden

title: A great listen
body: This show is always interesting, I like the format. The episodes are longer than a lot of shows which is a good idea.
author: Mr67890

title: All
body: I have been listening on Spotify to ye guys for the last few years. Absolutely love each episode! I used to hand pick certain episodes but now I don't even check the description. Each episode is outstanding. Funny, interesting and fascinating!!! Keep up the great work lads!
author: Dave S

title: New Fave
body: Discovered this pod yesterday when I searched for ‘Oceangate’ and I’m hooked! I love a good and thorough breakdown on a subject now I’m going down the rabbit hole listening to the older episodes.
author: Fifi Down Under

title: Great mix
body: Awesome stories, well told. Very easy listening with a few laughs along the way.
author: adsck77

title: Just found this
body: So entertaining, yet so hilariously wrong at times. A stenographer is not a phone operator.😉
author: Darryl

title: Fantastic presentation, funny and interesting
body: These two are perfectly matched. So funny, great topics, super presentation. Love listening them.
author: jjicu

title: Great Stories
body: My new favorite podcast.  A perfect mix of interesting stories, informative research and humor.  Their cadence and banter keep me engaged.
author: KD20975

title: Binge worthy
body: Very entertaining. Interesting topics, great banter. Just the right amount of humor, laughing and story telling.
author: jjicu

title: Grabs you and won’t let go!
body:
The presentation is thorough and informative. Additionally, their quirky keeps me entertained and happy despite the difficult topics 
Yeah!
author: Okay Drey

title: Praise from across the pond ✈️👏🏼
body: I stumbled on to these guys to hear their episode on the Last Breath diver and what a good find! I’m a big fan of their artwork for each episode and such good coverage! Their accents are oddly soothing and I especially enjoy the way they say “garage”. I’m unapologetically binging all their episodes. A+ highly recommend🫶🏼  - your new fan from Brooklyn, NYC
author: Chrislex7

title: Great show!
body: The Compendium Podcast is a true gem for anyone who loves meaningful conversation, intelligent analysis, and rich storytelling. The hosts strike a perfect balance between being informative and engaging, offering listeners a deep dive into a wide range of topics—from history and philosophy to pop culture and current events. What makes this podcast stand out is the depth of research and the clarity with which complex ideas are broken down. The episodes are well-paced, the production quality is high, and the tone is always respectful and curious. Whether you're a longtime podcast listener or just starting out, The Compendium is definitely worth adding to your playlist. I have a 1 hour commute and listening to this podcast makes my commute to work bearable. Much love from California <3
author: Analye Arenas

title: 5 stars
body: Interesting and wide ranging topics, well researched, and witty banter wrapped with a British accent bow. What’s not to love?
author: Sneakers8888

title: Fabulous find
body: I am a new listener who stumbled upon this podcast through their Tania Head episode. It’s only been a week and I’ve pretty much gone through their entire back catalogue. The hosts are entertaining and have great banter without going off topic constantly (a personal pet peeve of mine). So glad that I found this podcast!!!
author: We Shall Overcomb_

title: New Listener
body: Oh my lord!!! I’m a Canadian Listener, and let me tell you!! I commute 1 hour plus each way for work everyday and first listened to your podcast on Gabby Petito. The second episode I listened to was the trashman yacht sinking and I was hooked! Your personalities, sense of humour and the way you deliver these podcasts is UNMATCHED!!! Please please please keep making these!
author: slejdheueieke ne

title: Awesome podcast!
body: The episodes are always so interesting, the themes very diverse, but always told with a level of respect and integrity that is very refreshing. The podcast I hear when I go on my runs!!
author: Leonor

title: i love this podcast!!
body: I discovered this podcast through your covering of the amanda knox case. I loved how clear and easy itwas to understand and will definitely be coming back!!
author: Adalanderson

title: Obsessed!
body: I am loving this podcast! I am so glad I stumbled across it at 3am when I couldn't sleep. Thank you so much Kyle and Adam for all your hard work. You tell a good story and the banter is ace. Keep up the good work <3
author: Harriet Collins

title: Fave New Podcast
body: I love the perfect mix of cockney and blue blood accent of  the hosts and their humor and style is also great its quirky but still has plenty of the dark and mysterious plus a wonderfully dark humor it’s a must listen!
author: Corgi Wendy

title: Entertaining and Informative
body: This show lives up to their promise - I am entertained and can now hold my own at any social gathering!
author: love2Bre

title: Love!!!
body: I just started listening about 3 weeks ago and I can't stop listening! I absolutely love the stories!
author: Janell York

title: Enjoying this hidden gem!
body:
Interesting stories, told clearly with just enough info, not too thin or too many details. The banter between the hosts injects a bit of levity without being distracting or disrespectful. Minimal ads, so that makes it easy to listen to, too.

I’ve listened to a ton of true crime & am largely disappointed with the garbage content being put out these days by big media companies, but this is one I keep coming back to, it feels like what podcasts used to be in a good way. Check it out & leave them a review, they deserve more listeners & attention!
author: LaurieBudlong

title: Great podcast
body: I stumbled across this podcast by accident- really glad I did! The hosts are very engaging and cover a range of stories with the right balance of humour and sensitivity. Now making my way through all the previous episodes :)
author: K1_P1

title: I’m new to this….
body: I’m new to this podcast, found by chance and loving the boys, their style and voices and the depth of these stories. You have brightened my days guys, thank you x
author: Ruby and Freddie

title: Absolutely My Favorite Podcast!!
body:
Kyle and Adam, The Compendium is my absolute favorite podcast!! Every episode is amazingly told, and you always make me laugh. You two really compliment each other. When I listen to The Compendium I always feel like I’m just lounging around with friends, listening to fantastic stories. I first started listening to you every night, now I also listen in the morning with my first cup of coffee. I’m almost out of episodes! 😭
Love you both! 🥰
author: Simply_Samantha

title: Ms.
body: I adore the both of you! Thank you for being in my earholes and making me laugh out loud, in public, embarrassing (and sometimes peeing) myself 🤭
author: Holly

title: Great podcast!
body: I just found your podcast as I was looking for podcasts that have covered the Jennifer Fairgate unsolved case. I am really enjoying listening to your other content too. 5 stars! Keep up the good work!!
author: Summerbreezesmakemefeelfine

title: Love this podcast!
body:
Thank you Kyle & Adam for finding these great stories! Some I know very well, others I had heard about, but didn’t know the details. 
It is such a a pleasure to listen to you both. Cheers, Holly, Santa Cruz, CA. 😎
author: hollylynk

title: Totally hooked!
body: I always look forward to the next episode of The Compendium of Fascinating Things. I enjoy each intriguing story, and it's great learning more interesting facts about the topics that I thought I knew about! Kyle and Adam are entertaining and easy to listen to, so I highly recommend their podcast!
author: Bernie

title: Ahhh-mazing!
body:
Kyle and Adam are saying what I am thinking... ALWAYS!
Found The Compendium by searching for a topic I was interested in hearing about (2 brothers that un-alived their parents) and never listened to another podcast since.
"All The Latest Things" - YES, PLEASE!
Kyle singing and doing accents - DOUBLE YES!
I have a very long drive to and from work so I get to listen to 2 1/2 episodes 3-4 times a week. Cannot get enough!
author: Tiffany

title: So much fun!
body: I love this podcast! Adam & Kyle are so funny. The episodes are informative and educational, but honestly they are made even better by the banter, Adam & Kyle are so clever and fun.
author: Andrea

title: Laughs, gasps and some brother eeews!
body: This podcast is a captivating dive into the depths of true crime and mysterious happenings! Kyle & Adams engaging storytelling and meticulous research brings each case file to life. Each episode is a well-crafted blend of suspense, mystery, historical context and humour making it an addictive listen for any true crime / conspiracy theory enthusiast!!
author: James H

title: Road Trip Discovery: A New Podcast Obsession
body: I totally stumbled onto this podcast during a road trip, and now I'm hooked! Kyle and Adam have this amazing way of chatting about stuff that makes you feel like you're just hanging out with some friends. I mean, who knew I could get so into topics like the Titanic? Their conversational style is so engaging that I found myself learning things I never expected. Seriously, these guys are awesome - keep it up!
author: Mano chavali

title: Favourite podcast
body: I love how they tell the stories and have little banter with each other. Both voices are very easy to listen to. I love when a new episode is released.
author: Cheryl

title: Fascinating and Intriguing
body: With a 45 minute daily work commute, I’ve become a podcast junkie. I love to be educated, but also like the occasional humor. Kyle and Adam have really nailed the formula and have a knack for making you feel like you’re a friend engaging in on the juicy conversation.
author: Core.e

title: Thank you!
body:
I just happened to find you guys when I searched for podcasts on the Menendez brothers!

I have now listened to you every day whilst working in my studio: you are funny, informative, interesting, engaging and I love your diverse content!

Thank you for being so utterly amazing… Keep it up guys 😁
Carole x
author: Carole

title: my favorite podcast!
body: i'm so happy to have stumbled apon this podcast! the compendium is now a part of my daily work routine and i'm always excited for new episodes! thank you kyle and adam for all your hard work, you make my days better! <3
author: mandy

title: My fav ! On heavy rotation every day
body: I feel like you are my besties and you help me with doing my daily 17k steps. My fav format which is all the latest news, some history, sprinkle of true crime, hilarious af and just super down to earth funny. Love u guys
author: Thechadwasgreat

title: Great podcast!
body: Great podcast, such different stories and told in a very fun and interesting way! Love!
author: Eefjevdh1009

title: Great Find!
body: The Compendium is certainly a diamond in the rough of podcasting. Their exploration of fascinating topics keeps me coming back week after week
author: Aiden Thompson

title: Excellent podcast
body: I'm from Portugal and I just find this podcast because of DB Cooper episode and I just got hooked! Great hosts with the right flow in the conversation. Please don't stop 🥺. Thanks for doing this mate's 😆
author: Caldas

title: Easy and enjoyable
body: Entertaining and informative, always look forward to the latest offering from these two.
author: Eamonn McDermott

title: F-ing Brilliant
body: A combination of fascinating stories, factual moments in history and fun theorising between the two hosts, highly recommend a weekly dose!
author: Elizabeth

title: My favorite podcast
body: I love this podcast! I love hearing the details of stories and situatons you've heard of, and always meant to research, but never got around to it. Sometimes I dont recognize the story from the title, bit when the hosts get into it, you're like "oh right! I remember hearing about this!". Highly entertaining and content is very well researched. Highly recommend!
author: Kate Brown

title: Superb commute companion
body: Love this podcast! The episodes are so interesting and varied, I really look forward to each new episode. The hosts have great chemistry. I'm drawn to this podcast because it isn't draining on my brain, just an interesting easy listen to gear me up for the day.
author: Laura McMahon

title: Fascination at its Finest!
body: The Compendium is a fascinating podcast. It's like an adventure into the depths of the intriguing. Bravo, Kyle and Adam!
author: Mira

title: Might just keep me sane....
body:
Thank you both for your empathetic, intriguing and fascinating content! Love you both....especially Adam.

5 Stars ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
author: Ms. Holly

title: One of my favourite podcasts!
body: Awesome podcast! Love Adam and Kyle, great show, and one of my favourite shows that I look forward to every week! I try to savour the episodes for walks so I can enjoy them without being distracted. Definitely recommend!
author: Nebnobs

title: Great podcast!
body:
This podcast helps me get through tough work days, and always gets me in a better mood.
Thank you for doing this you guys, it helps people more than you know!
Best regards from Denmark
author: Nicolai Henriksen

title: Love me a mystery
body: I’m constantly searching for content that both educates and entertains. The Compendium hits the mark on both counts. I'm hooked
author: Olivia

title: Brilliant!
body: What an awesome podcast! Just recently discovered this podcast and I am obsessed! The hosts are truly captivating each with their own style. I love their storytelling--Kyle is quick-witted with a sharp sense of humor and Adam's voice--smooth as liquid gold. Loving each and every episode. My favorite so far is "Rodriguez"--such a fascinating story! Please, sir, I want some more. Keep 'em coming, Adam and Kyle!!
author: Peaches

title: A perfect way to spend a long walk!
body: Being a Mum of a toddler and with one on the way, I'm always looking for a good podcast for long walks to the park and late nights up with a sleepy baby, and I am so thrilled to have found Compendium! It is such a refreshing, and funny listen, where I'm literally learning so much about history each week. I love the chemistry and natural banter between Kyle & Adam and really enjoy that they both are discovering the stories along with the listener. The subjects they cover are completely varied and not topics I have thought much about before however I'm really enjoying finding out about important moments in history that I knew nothing about . The story of The Ranium Girls has stayed with me and I bought my Mum a book all about it. I had no idea! I love the jovial manner of the Podcast and really enjoy the intro part of each episode too where they catchup on their week, as it sets a great tone. Lovely guys, great listen. I would highly recommend it! Thanks a lot!
author: Phoebe

title: LOVE your podcast
body: I feel like I'm sitting there with you and listening to the most interesting conversation :) thanks for hours of entertainment!
author: Shani

title: A gem for the mind!
body: Can't wait each week for their next episode
author: Vaios

title: Just cant get enough
body: I love you guys more than anything, and your stores are just so interesting, Thank you and keep it up
author: Jane

title: Definitely worth listening to!
body: Each episode is a semi-deep dive into a compendium of topics from pop culture phenomena (Village People) to lesser-known (but should be known!) disasters (Balloonfest!). The hosts, Adam and Kyle, are natural storytellers with their lighthearted approach  and their wit!  So much fun to listen to!!! Highly recommended!
author: It’s Me1969

title: Constantly Fascinated and Intrigued
body: I can’t recommend The Compendium Podcast Enough. Kyle and Adam make us laugh from start to finish. I just love the different topics they cover and can’t wait for each new episode on my way to the office. Thanks for keeping us in a constant state of fascination and intrigue. X
author: Nickolai1980

title: Brilliant pod
body:
Each week more intriguing and entertaining than the last!

Makes my one office day commute a week much more bearable!
author: Matt.heart.Britney

title: Enjoyable!
body: I’ve been listening to this podcast every day on my bike ride to work. Adam and Kyle are humorous and easy to listen to. I am especially taken with how they told the Ariel Castro story as a survivor story about Michelle, Amanda, and Gina - instead of focusing on the shock and awe of the awful ordeal. I enjoy the light hearted conversations and not-too-detailed overview of interesting events.
author: Britt Q

title: Fun Listen
body: Enjoy listening to this every week whilst driving, keep it up guys
author: AlanR1990

title: The inner workings of a curious mind
body:
Having listened since the start, I can say that I genuinely look forward to Tuesday mornings when I listen to an episode on my way to work, sure to peak your curiosity and leave you wanting to learn more.
The hosts both bring unique characteristics, have a great dynamic and take it in turns to lead on a variety of topics, I highly recommend adding these chaps to your weekly rotation!
author: eevans0797
